title: Sales Manager Vacancy at PropEquity - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at PropEquity - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
PropEquity, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About PropEquity:
PropEquity is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropEquity!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
